steps.summary: Test course for the eXeLearning Web plugin.

steps.name: Test Content
steps.intro: Sample eXeLearning web content for testing.

steps.code:
<?php
define('CLI_SCRIPT', true);
require('/www/moodle/config.php');
require_once($CFG->dirroot . '/mod/exeweb/lib.php');
require_once($CFG->dirroot . '/mod/exeweb/locallib.php');

$course = $DB->get_record('course', ['shortname' => 'EXEWEB01'], '*', MUST_EXIST);
$modules = [
    'Test Content' => '/tmp/test-content.elpx',
    'Propiedades' => '/tmp/propiedades.elpx',
];

foreach ($modules as $modname => $filepath) {
    $exeweb = $DB->get_record('exeweb', ['course' => $course->id, 'name' => $modname]);
    if (!$exeweb || !file_exists($filepath)) continue;

    $cm = get_coursemodule_from_instance('exeweb', $exeweb->id, $course->id);
    $context = context_module::instance($cm->id);
    $fs = get_file_storage();

    $newrevision = (int)$exeweb->revision + 1;
    $filename = basename($filepath);

    $fileinfo = [
        'contextid' => $context->id,
        'component' => 'mod_exeweb',
        'filearea' => 'package',
        'itemid' => $newrevision,
        'filepath' => '/',
        'filename' => $filename,
        'userid' => 2,
        'source' => $filename,
        'author' => 'Admin User',
        'license' => 'unknown',
    ];

    $newpackage = $fs->create_file_from_pathname($fileinfo, $filepath);

    try {
        $contentslist = \mod_exeweb\exeweb_package::expand_package($newpackage);
        $mainfile = \mod_exeweb\exeweb_package::get_mainfile($contentslist, $context->id, $newrevision);
        if ($mainfile) {
            $exeweb->entrypath = $mainfile->get_filepath();
            $exeweb->entryname = $mainfile->get_filename();
        }
    } catch (Throwable $e) {}

    $exeweb->exeorigin = 'local';
    $exeweb->revision = $newrevision;
    $exeweb->timemodified = time();
    $DB->update_record('exeweb', $exeweb);
}
echo json_encode(['ok' => true]);
